---
title: "Outreach"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

# Media and blog articles

- **[Educació concertada i polítiques d’equitat: la necessitat d’una narrativa](https://example.com/article1)** (together with Clara Fontdevila and Antoni Verger).  
  *Diari de l'Educació.* September 19, 2022.

- **[Cuatro áreas que hay que reformar en la educación privada subvencionada](https://example.com/article2)** (together with Gonzalo Muñoz, Cristián Bellei and Marcela Ramos).  
  *Tercera dosis.* July 31, 2022.

- **[La escuela concertada ante las desigualdades: el debate pendiente](https://example.com/article3)** (together with Antoni Verger and Clara Fontdevila).  
  *El País.* June 7, 2022.

- **[Escola concertada i desigualtats educatives: què diu la recerca i per què és urgent parar-ne clar](https://example.com/article4)** (together with Antoni Verger and Clara Fontdevila).  
  *Diari de l'Educació.* May 5, 2022.

- **[¿Se puede asegurar el derecho a la educación en un sistema privatizado como el chileno?](https://example.com/article5)** (together with Gonzalo Muñoz, Cristián Bellei and Marcela Ramos).  
  *Tercera dosis.* March 20, 2022.

- **[Repetición escolar, una mala política educativa](https://example.com/article6)** (together with Xavier Bonal and Sheila González).  
  *El País.* December 16, 2021.

- **[El model d'escola concertada en el debat internacional: implicacions per al sistema educatiu català](https://example.com/article7)** (together with Antoni Verger and Clara Fontdevila).  
  *Sentimients.cat.* November 30, 2021.

- **[Private sector participation in education: where it occurs, and why](https://example.com/article8)** (together with Antoni Verger and Clara Fontdevila).  
  *World Education Blog.* February 24, 2020.

- **[PISA 2018: cuando la hemeroteca no perdona](https://example.com/article9)** (together with Xavier Bonal).  
  *El Periódico.* December 9, 2019.

- **[Is it Possible to Balance Education Markets and Equity? On the Limits of Regulation and Policy Designs](https://example.com/article10)**  
  *NORRAG blog.* November 6, 2019.

- **[Els reptes educatius de Barcelona: una mirada en clau d'equitat](https://example.com/article11)** (together with Alba Castells).  
  *CRÍTIC.* October 7, 2019.

- **[La FP dual: ¿una política de éxito?](https://example.com/article12)** (together with Xavier Bonal).  
  *El Periódico.* September 16, 2019.

- **[Sobre PISA i el triomfalisme educatiu](https://example.com/article13)** (together with Xavier Bonal and Alba Castells).  
  *Diari de l'Educació.* December 7, 2016.

- **[The Privatisation of Education: a Global Phenomenon with Multiple Faces](https://example.com/article14)** (together with Antoni Verger and Clara Fontdevila).  
  *NORRAG blog.* September 7, 2016.

- **[Mercat educatiu i desigualtats: el repte de Bachelet](https://example.com/article15)**  
  *Diari de l'Educació.* February 16, 2014.

- **[Beyond Learning Outcomes: Reflections on the Measurement of 'Education for All' in the Post-2015 Scenario](https://example.com/article16)** (together with Antoni Verger and Xavier Bonal).  
  *Worlds of Education.* October 14, 2013.
